# CWE-366 safe — Race Condition within a Thread (mitigated)
lang: go
file: CWE-366-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
	"sync/atomic"
)

type GinCtx struct {
	Request *http.Request
}

var walletCredits int64

type SqlxDB struct{}

func (db *SqlxDB) Exec(query string, args ...interface{}) error { return nil }

func ApplyPromoCredit(c *GinCtx, db *SqlxDB) error {
	newTotal := atomic.AddInt64(&walletCredits, 10)
	return db.Exec("UPDATE wallets SET credits = ? WHERE user = ?", newTotal, c.Request.URL.Query().Get("user"))
}
